'''thapuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobra|dobra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobra|dobra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thapuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæpijith|thæpijith]] || [[word:thæpijij|thæpijij]] || [[word:thæpijish|thæpijish]] || [[word:thæpiji|thæpiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thapupujuth|thapupujuth]] || [[word:thapupujuj|thapupujuj]] || [[word:thapupujush|thapupujush]] || [[word:thapupuju|thapupuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapujuth|thapujuth]] || [[word:thapujuj|thapujuj]] || [[word:thapujush|thapujush]] || [[word:thapuju|thapuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapufjuth|thapufjuth]] || [[word:thapufjuj|thapufjuj]] || [[word:thapufjush|thapufjush]] || [[word:thapufjuf|thapufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thapujuthu|thapujuthu]] || [[word:thapujuju|thapujuju]] || [[word:thapujushu|thapujushu]] || [[word:thapujuku|thapujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thapujuth|thapujuth]] || [[word:thapujuj|thapujuj]] || [[word:thapujush|thapujush]] || [[word:thapuju|thapuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thapujuthul|thapujuthul]] || [[word:thapujujul|thapujujul]] || [[word:thapujushul|thapujushul]] || [[word:thapujukul|thapujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thapujuthuthu|thapujuthuthu]] || [[word:thapujujuju|thapujujuju]] || [[word:thapujushushu|thapujushushu]] || [[word:thapujuku|thapujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thapujuthun|thapujuthun]] || [[word:thapujujun|thapujujun]] || [[word:thapujushun|thapujushun]] || [[word:thapujukun|thapujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thapujuthuoro|thapujuthuoro]] || [[word:thapujujuoro|thapujujuoro]] || [[word:thapujushuoro|thapujushuoro]] || [[word:thapujukuoro|thapujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
